subject: Re: yo
body:
where is she from?  the only way is to have her give
back the money, , she must be called into your office
or wherever,, told that if she returns the money ,
nothing will happen,, otherweise,, you will press
charges and she will both go to jail   and still have
to evntually pay back the money,,, she knows where the
money is,, you will never find it without her help.

--- jeanlucbrunel <jeanluc@mc2mm.com> wrote:

> Hi
> 
> In any story there is a good and a bad side.
> Starting with the bad one..
> 
> I am sure that you have noticed how I have changed
> in the last two years. I
> was trying to resolve problems crippling the
> development of the agency.
> 
> I am so furious that beside the fact that the
> accountant has stolen money
> that she had poisoned 3 years of my life. I had to
> live with the fear of
> failure, doubting at every moment of the day of
> being able to be successful
> again.
> 
> The good side is that it is an element of the past
> and in a certain way a
> relief.
> 
> Now, I think that she has stolen more than 500.000$.
> We have discovered that
> she has bought a house in Peru etc....
> 
> What should I do?
> 
> Should I take a company like Kroll? Should I start
> to start with a civil law
> suit? It will take a little time to prepare
> documents to press criminal
> charges and I am afraid that if I start a civil law
> suit she will flee. I
> would like to know what is the best way to go in
> order to freeze her assets.
> 
> 
> YO YO , a little time to get reed of my bruises,
> time that you can use to
> get ready also to  enjoy life again. Get
> ready!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  I
> am back .
> 
> I am so mad, you cannot imagine
> 
> Thank you again for al your support during those two
> years. I don't tell you
> that you are the best.you could believe it
> 
> Jean luc
> 
>  
> 
>  
> 
>

body_html:
where is she from? the only way is to have her give
back the money, , she must be called into your office
or wherever,, told that if she returns the money ,
nothing will happen,, otherweise,, you will press
charges and she will both go to jail and still have

--- jeanlucbrunel jeanluc@mc2mm.com wrote:

Hi

In any story there is a good and a bad side.
Starting with the bad one..

I am sure that you have noticed how I have changed
in the last two years. I
was trying to resolve problems crippling the
development of the agency.

I am so furious that beside the fact that the
accountant has stolen money
that she had poisoned 3 years of my life. I had to
live with the fear of
failure, doubting at every moment of the day of
being able to be successful
again.

The good side is that it is an element of the past
and in a certain way a
relief.

Now, I think that she has stolen more than 500.000$.
We have discovered that
she has bought a house in Peru etc....

What should I do?

Should I take a company like Kroll? Should I start
to start with a civil law
suit? It will take a little time to prepare
documents to press criminal
charges and I am afraid that if I start a civil law
suit she will flee. I
would like to know what is the best way to go in
order to freeze her assets.

YO YO , a little time to get reed of my bruises,
time that you can use to
get ready also to enjoy life again. Get
ready!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I
am back .

I am so mad, you cannot imagine

Thank you again for al your support during those two
years. I don't tell you
that you are the best.you could believe it

Jean luc
